name: deckit
description: An end-to-end image-first deck workflow. When explicitly invoked, even with topic-only prompts such as "介绍一下 F-16", Deckit runs through brief, storyboard, image prompts, official $imagegen slide generation, review, and non-editable PPTX image-container packaging unless the user explicitly asks for text-only/no deck artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Run topic/source material into generated image-first slides and a PPTX container.
interface.longDescription: Deckit coordinates an end-to-end image-first deck production workflow: ingest text / PDF / URL or a topic seed, shape the argument, plan slide storyboards, write image-generation prompts, invoke the official $imagegen skill to produce full-slide images, package those images into a non-editable PPTX container when packaging is available, and run review/audit before delivery. When explicitly invoked, Deckit treats topic-only requests such as "介绍一下 F-16" as complete deck-production requests, not plain prose answers and not prompt-pack-only runs. It should not stop to ask for a separate "continue" before image generation or PPTX packaging unless the user explicitly requested text-only/no deck artifacts or a required tool is unavailable. Ambiguous requests such as "make a PPT" or "制作 PPT" are handled as image-first slide generation. Deckit does not create editable native PowerPoint decks; a .pptx is only a non-editable container for generated full-slide images that passes audit-pptx as exactly one picture per slide.
defaultPrompt: Turn this transcript into a complete image-first deck with generated full-slide images and PPTX packaging.
介绍一下 F-16 战斗机。
Make a complete image-first PPTX deck with generated full-slide images.
